summary: Tested two new features: (1) AuditBinder download block on /knowledge-center/all-checklists and (2) Preview Contents modal on product pages. All tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features fully working. Feature 1: audit-binder-download block visible on /knowledge-center/all-checklists with beige bg, label, heading, and gold download button. Feature 2: preview-toc-btn present on new-entrant-packet and drug-alcohol-packet; modal opens with Table of Contents label (coral), numbered TOC items, price, and Get Instant Access button; X close and overlay click-to-close both work. buy-packet-btn regression check passed.
